# mujoco-mcp

A general-purpose MuJoCo physics simulation server via MCP.

## Tools
- load_model / list_models — model depot management
- start_sim / stop_sim / list_jobs — simulation lifecycle
- get_state / apply_control — sim state and control
- export_frame — offscreen rendering
- sim_status — health check
- agentic_sim_workflow — multi-step AI orchestration
- natural_language_control — NL to actuator commands
- analyze_sim_state / analyze_sim_logs — AI analysis
- discover_model — AI-powered model discovery

## Setup
```powershell
uv run python -m mujoco_mcp
```

## Docs
- docs/MUJOCO_VS_OTHERS.md — MuJoCo vs Gazebo/Isaac/PyBullet
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md — subprocess model, IPC design
